description: It's femininity celebrated and enhanced with this pair of heeled shoes from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair is a perfect part wear.This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease.Heel: 3"UpperSlip-on style shoe with a leather upper that has a sheen outer lining, back heel cup and forefoot cap with a peep toe for absolute comfort and styleSynthetic leather strip on the footbed for enhanced comfortBow on the forefoot strap for styleOutsoleNon-slip outsole with grooves on the forefoot and heel patch, and has a textured toe region for absolute grip even on smooth surfacesShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
